name: NOV Inc.
description: NOV Inc. is an American multinational corporation headquartered in Houston, Texas, that designs, manufactures, and sells systems, components, and products for the global energy industry. Serving primarily the upstream oil and gas sector, the company provides essential equipment and technology for drilling, completion, and production operations. With a history spanning over 150 years, NOV also supports industrial and renewable energy sectors, functioning as a key technological architect and equipment provider that enables customers to safely and efficiently produce energy resources worldwide through its extensive portfolio of proprietary technologies and integrated services.
